brand_identity.name: TrustLens
brand_identity.mission: To provide clarity on relationship dynamics through analytical, non-judgmental behavioral pattern analysis.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Clinical precision meets human empathy.
Emotion First: Every pixel conveys trust and clarity.
Content is King: Data is the narrative. Visualize it effectively.
Zoom In: Focus on the micro-signals that matter.
Negative Space: Use space to reduce cognitive load.

primary.name: Deep Blue
primary.description: The foundation. Represents depth, stability, and the subconscious.

secondary.name: Soft Turquoise
secondary.description: The light. Represents clarity, insight, and positive signals.

rules: Text contrast must meet WCAG AA standards.
Never use pure black (#000000) for backgrounds; use Obsidian (#0A0A0A) or Deep Blue (#1E2A38).

headings.usage: Use for all major section headers and data values.

body.usage: Use for narrative text, descriptions, and labels.

mono.usage: Use for small data labels, timestamps, and IDs.

dashboard.rules: Dense packing for data correlation. Use col-span-X to create hierarchy.

narrative.rules: Generous spacing for reading flow. Centered content column.

layout_strategies.container_rules: All bordered containers must have internal padding (p-6+) to prevent text collision.

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted/80 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-all

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visualizations.trust_gauge: Circular progress indicator with color interpolation (Red -> Yellow -> Turquoise).
visualizations.hypothesis_bars: Horizontal bars with probability percentage. Sorted descending.
visualizations.timeline: Vertical line with interactive nodes. Click to expand details.

tracing_beam.implementation: Animated gradient border using mask-image or framer-motion.

backgrounds.description: Abstract deep blue cell phone background
White and blue net close up
Dark blue background with wavy lines

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for animations: yarn add framer-motion
Install 'recharts' for data visualization: yarn add recharts
Create a 'components/ui' folder for reusable Shadcn-like components if not present.
Implement the 'Dark Mode' toggle in the Navbar.
Ensure all text meets APCA contrast standards, especially turquoise on white.
Use the provided image URLs for section backgrounds. Do not use placeholders.
Follow the Bento Grid layout for the main dashboard view.
Implement the 'Tracing Beam' effect for the active step in the analysis process.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic centered layouts, excessive gradients).
Do not use transparent backgrounds without blur/scrim for text readability.
All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Respect the user's color choices: Deep Blue (#1E2A38) and Soft Turquoise (#3AA6A6).
